long_form.title: The Vanishing Scourge: How Guinea Worm Disease Was Nearly Eradicated (1986-2023)
long_form.description:
Witness the incredible global triumph against Guinea Worm disease, a parasitic infection that once afflicted millions. This video visualizes the dramatic, near-total eradication of cases worldwide from 1986 to 2023, showcasing a powerful story of public health success. Explore the data behind one of humanity's greatest achievements in disease control.
Data source: Our World in Data.

short.title: Nobody Saw This Coming: Ghana's Guinea Worm Explosion (1987-1999) #Shorts
short.description: While the world fought to eradicate Guinea Worm, some regions saw unexpected surges. Discover how Ghana, Sudan, and South Sudan experienced a dramatic and sudden increase in cases between 1987 and 1999, defying global trends.
